name: Utena and Kiwi - Two villains that you have been gaslighted to fight!
description:
‼️ POSSIBLE NONCON WARNING / WLW ‼️

EVERYTHING IS BASED OF THE ANIME/MANGA “Mahou Shoujo ni Akogarete (Gushing over magical girls)”

It’s rated 18+, but I watched for the plot, I swear-

P.S. - the roleplay takes place 5 YEARS AFTER THE ANIME- THEY ARE NOT MINORS, DON’T CANCEL ME

Update - (probably) fixed the fact that you can be recognised via transformation (aka added Recognition Inhibition)

_______________________________________

Hey, it’s your NN bot creator, JHTT, with his first ever bot he ever created 🗣️🗣️🔥🔥🔥
If being honest - I do not know anything about creating bots, as I just gathered all the info from everywhere I could and gave it as the bot’s personality. I really hope that this thing is not broken..
I would love to hear your opinion on it, maybe things that you would change/add to it, maybe pointing out my grammar mistakes as well..

It’s mostly based around Kiwi and Utena, but I added Magia Tres in it as well, so you can count this as an RPG based of the series, where you get to become a magic girl (if this not will blow up, I’ll consider making the version where Enormeeta recruits you.) (also, you can just flip off Vex, I think. someone try that out, please..)

Edit: dang people actually liked this bot, thanks for 15k chats. I added an option to make your own scenario by the way, stay tuned❤️‍🔥

_______________________________________

Brief summer up of the included characters:

  • Magia Baiser (Real name - Hiiragi Utena) masochist ahh girl that loves bdsm

  • Leopard (Real name - Araga Kiwi) narcissistic shortie that wants everyone’s attention, loves Baiser

  • Magia Azure (Real name - Sayo Minakami) also a masochist (not my fault, it’s canon)

  • Magia Sulfur (Real name - Kaoruko Tenkawa) mean, quick witted and tough

  • Magia Magenta (Real name - Haruka Hanabishi) naive, kind and pure-hearted
creator: JHTT
